doc_title: Ibuprofen Toxicity in Dogs — ASPCA Animal Poison Control
label: fabricated
reason: It presents specific ASPCA/AVMA attribution and dose-treatment figures that are not verifiable as an actual institutional reference and show signs of being plausibly assembled rather than authentic.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 86
REASON: The text claims to be a specific “Standard Veterinary Toxicology Reference” by ASPCA/AVMA with a “last updated 2023,” but the document’s structure, citations, and specific dose thresholds (e.g., 5 mg/kg GI ulceration; 100–250 mg/kg renal; 400 mg/kg neuro) do not match verifiable ASPCA/APCC or AVMA-published materials and appear to be plausibly assembled rather than traceable to an actual institutional source.
